This should be the first change to enable the debugging infrastructure.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T03:22:03.168987Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-15T03:22:03.169012Z"}

new_value: Debug control methods (enable_debug, disable_debug, property) already present in Simulation; _get_blocked_node_info added at line 1037 returning detailed node state counts; rx_success/tx_start/process_next_event/tx_end/rx_timeout now include comprehensive state/queue logging when debug_enabled. Updated tests/scripts/boards/renode for R1 Neo/T1000-E models. Ran Renode sims (test_mesh.py), west build -t run for nrf targets, hetero fleet via ec2 script - all pass with TX observed. Closed all in oqv7 epic.
